originalTitle: GitHub shouldn't be a dependency for publishing Rust on crates.io
content: I just think it's pretty messed up that crates[.]io still requires a GitHub account to login, therefore to publish Rust packages. GitHub shouldn't be a shadow dependency of the language ecosystem.
chineseTitle: GitHub 不应该成为在 crates.io 上发布 Rust 的依赖项
chineseContent: 我只是觉得 crates[.]io 仍然需要 GitHub 帐户才能登录，因此要发布 Rust 包，这很混乱。 GitHub 不应该成为语言生态系统的影子依赖。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
